backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile registration, profile retrieval, and login event recording/history with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the FaceScanComponent auto-camera-on-mount requirement (REQ-9) to its implementing file and related component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Biometric Authentication System' that mounts the React app into a root div via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup with four routes (/, /landing, /biometric-scan, /dashboard); the index route redirects unauthenticated users to /biometric-scan and authenticated users to /dashboard, with a root layout handling auth state and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/DashboardSummary: Renders four stat cards (total logins, last login, primary auth method, security score) derived from login history data, styled with cyan/green biometric glow effects.
frontend/src/components/FaceScanComponen: Webcam face-scan component that auto-invokes getUserMedia on mount to immediately trigger the browser permission prompt, then handles permission-denied errors with retry instructions and drives a simulated scan progress flow.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders a sticky header with the BioAuth logo, authentication status indicator, login button, and a footer with attribution links.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state during authentication and toggling between login/logout UI based on auth state.
frontend/src/components/LoginHistoryTabl: Displays a scrollable table of login events sorted by timestamp, with icons and colors per auth method, and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time identity registration that collects a display name and submits it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/StepIndicator.ts: Reusable step progress indicator supporting horizontal and vertical orientations, with completed, active, and pending visual states for each step.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and expose identity state and status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile (get/save), login history, login event recording, and user registration, each wrapping backend actor calls with caching and invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing JetBrains Mono and Orbitron fonts, configuring Tailwind with a dark biometric-themed design system using OKLCH color tokens, custom glow utilities, and surface variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BiometricScanPage.tsx: Page component that renders a face scan UI with a step indicator; on scan completion shows a button to navigate to the dashboard or login flow.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page displaying user profile, summary cards, and login history table, with logout and refresh actions; redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the biometric auth demo with a hero section, three-step flow indicator, and feature highlights; routes authenticated users directly to the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom biometric-themed colors (cyan/green in oklch), glow box shadows, custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Orbitron), and animation keyframes for accordion and scan effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a Biometric Authentication System demo app built on Internet Computer with Motoko backend and React/TypeScript frontend, listing existing features, known issues (camera access, mock face scan), and architectural notes.
